subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy maidservant who imploreth the Kingdom of Thy mercy, who is drawn to the fragrances of Thy holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امتک المبتهله الی ملکوت رحمانیتک المنجذبه بنفحات قدسک التی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
